title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · MCP Build Room
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a skill test and release harness while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-usage-feedback-1sxcte: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Usage Feedback into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-usage-feedback-1sxcte:

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: More instructions always fix skill reliability.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Usage Feedback condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Usage Feedback applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
